sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33277" key="e)kxrw/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκχρώννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n33277.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impart a colour</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἥλιος σκοτεινὸν ἄνθος ἐξέχρωσε λιγνύος εἰς σώματ᾽ ἀνδρῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0329.tlg001:17:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodect.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
